subject: docs: remove HISTORY.md and archive workflow
body:
Cross-fleet policy: git log is the completion record, so a separate
changelog file is redundant. Deleted docs/HISTORY.md, removed its
CLAUDE.md subsection, and replaced TODO archival wording with
"delete completed items (git history tracks them)".

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: doc-hygiene
Semver: patch
